message:
test(rbac): cover CreatedAt nil-on-zero behavior in List+Create SA + gofmt (#6769) (#6770)

- Fix gofmt nit: merge stray blank line in stdlib imports of rbac_test.go.
- Extend TestRBAC_ListServiceAccounts with two fake SAs (one with a real
  CreationTimestamp, one zero) and assert CreatedAt is non-nil / nil
  respectively, locking in the omitempty-friendly behavior from #6764.
- Add TestRBAC_CreateServiceAccount_CreatedAt exercising both code paths
  of CreateServiceAccount: the default fake clientset (zero timestamp,
  CreatedAt must be nil) and a PrependReactor that stamps a non-zero
  CreationTimestamp on the returned SA (CreatedAt must equal it).

Closes #6769

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
